zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Ann York於1726年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特諾廷加姆 堂史普時，她的父親Jeremiah York43歲，母親Sarah Ann Wilson25歲。她和William Diffee Jr至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1790年12月2日在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫享年64歲，埋葬在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫格雷斯 查阿培爾奧德爾 特洛格頓 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Ann York于1726年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特諾廷加姆 堂史普时，她的父亲Jeremiah York43岁，母亲Sarah Ann Wilson25岁。她和William Diffee Jr至少有4个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1790年12月2日在美国北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫享年64岁，埋葬在美国北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫格雷斯 查阿培爾奧德爾 特洛格頓 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: York
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of York in northern England. The surname is now widespread throughout England. Originally, the city bore the Latin name Eburacum, which is probably from a Brittonic name meaning ‘yew-tree place’. This was altered by folk etymology to Old English Eoforwīc (from the elements eofor ‘wild boar’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’). This name was taken over by Scandinavian settlers, who altered it back to opacity in the form Jórvík or Jórk (English York, which became finally settled as the placename in the 13th century). The surname has also been adopted by Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of the East Slavic patronymic   Yurkovich   or its Croatian, Slovak, or Slovenian variants. Compare   Yurk  .

variants.name: Yurkovich
meanings: Ukrainian (standard transliteration Yurkovych) and Belorussian: patronymic from the personal name Yurko and its Belorussian equivalent Yurka, pet forms of Ukrainian Yuriy and Belorussian Yuray, equivalents of Greek Geōrgios (see George ).
Americanized form of Croatian Jurković, Slovak and Slovenian Jurkovič (see Jurkovic , compare Jurkovich and Yurkovic ).
Jewish (from Bessarabia): habitational name for someone from Yurkovtsy in Ukraine.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Ann York was born in 1726, in Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, her father, Jeremiah York, was 43 and her mother, Sarah Ann Wilson, was 25. She had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with William Diffee Jr. She died on 2 December 1790, in Randolph, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 64, and was buried in Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, North Carolina, United States.

Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec William Diffee Jr. Elle est décédée le 2 décembre 1790, à Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ann York è nata il nel 1726 nel Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, sua padre, Jeremiah York, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Sarah Ann Wilson, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con William Diffee Jr. Morì il 2 dicembre 1790, nel Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvan: イギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州チェスターノッティンガム トウンシュイップ
ja.Colony of North Carolina, British Coloni: イギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann Yorkが1726年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州チェスターノッティンガム トウンシュイップで生まれた時，父Jeremiah Yorkは43歳，母Sarah Ann Wilsonは25歳であった。彼女はWilliam Diffee Jrとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1790年12月2日にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフで64歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフグレイズ チャペルオデル トログドン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Opequon, Frederick, Virginia, British Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크 p크
ko.Randolph, North Carolina, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프

ko.Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvan: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 노틴그함 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ann York(이)가 1726년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 체스터 노틴그함 타운시프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jeremiah York(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Ann Wilson(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 William Diffee Jr(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1790년 12월 2일 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프 그라이스 차플 오데 트로그던 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ann York nasceu em 1726, em Nottingham Township, Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, seu pai, Jeremiah York, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Ann Wilson, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com William Diffee Jr. Ela faleceu em 2 de dezembro de 1790, em Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Ann York родилась в 1726 г. в местности ноттингхам тоуншип, честир, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Jeremiah York было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Ann Wilson, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от William Diffee Jr. Она умерла 2 декабря 1790 г. в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности оделл трогдон кеметири, греис чапел, рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Ann York nació en 1726, en Nottingham Township, Chester, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, su papá, Jeremiah York, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Sarah Ann Wilson, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con William Diffee Jr. Murió el 2 de diciembre de 1790, en Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos.
